summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the Enquiry Page redesign as a luxury invitation card design. All 16 test features passed. The page displays a beautiful invitation card with decorative roses and gold frame, with the enquiry form overlaid on the white center area. Form fields have transparent backgrounds with gold bottom borders, no rounded corners. Header is non-sticky on this page. Responsive layout works correctly (3-col desktop, 2-col tablet, 1-col mobile). Form submission via Google Form POST (no-cors) shows success message correctly.
test_credentials: No auth required for enquiry page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enquiry page redesign testing completed. All 16 features verified: (1) Enquiry page loads at /enquiry with ivory background (#f5efe8) - PASS, (2) Invitation card image visible as background - PASS, (3) Logo visible at top center inside card - PASS, (4) 'GET IN TOUCH WITH US' heading in gold color, serif font - PASS, (5) Form inputs: transparent background, gold bottom border, no rounded corners - PASS, (6) Row 1: Full Name, Email, Phone inputs (3 columns on desktop) - PASS, (7) Row 2: Event Date, Event Location, Estimated Guest Count (3 columns on desktop) - PASS, (8) Row 3: Event Type dropdown and Referral dropdown (2 columns) - PASS, (9) Event Type dropdown options correct - PASS, (10) Referral dropdown options correct - PASS, (11) Row 4: Vision textarea (2 rows height) - PASS, (12) Submit button 'BEGIN YOUR CELEBRATION' with gold border, no rounded corners - PASS, (13) Form submission shows success message - PASS, (14) Header is NOT sticky on enquiry page - PASS, (15) No rounded corners on any element - PASS, (16) Responsive: form stacks to single column on mobile (390px width) - PASS.

features_tested.enquiry_page_loads_with_ivory_bg: PASS - Page loads at /enquiry with background #f5efe8 (rgb(245, 239, 232))
features_tested.invitation_card_image_visible: PASS - enquiry-card.png displayed with decorative roses and gold frame
features_tested.logo_at_top_center: PASS - Logo visible at top center inside the card
features_tested.heading_gold_serif: PASS - 'GET IN TOUCH WITH US' heading in gold (#C6A75E) with serif font
features_tested.input_styles_correct: PASS - Transparent background, gold bottom border, no rounded corners (border-radius: 0px)
features_tested.row1_3_columns_desktop: PASS - Full Name, Email, Phone in 3-column grid on desktop
features_tested.row2_3_columns_desktop: PASS - Event Date, Event Location, Guest Count in 3-column grid on desktop
features_tested.row3_2_columns_dropdowns: PASS - Event Type and Referral dropdowns in 2-column grid
features_tested.event_type_options: PASS - Wedding, Corporate Event, Catering, SFX & Entries, Others all present
features_tested.referral_options: PASS - Instagram, Youtube, Google, Friend & Family, Others all present
features_tested.vision_textarea_height: PASS - Textarea has rows=2 for 2-3 lines height
features_tested.submit_button_styles: PASS - 'BEGIN YOUR CELEBRATION' with gold border (#C6A75E), no rounded corners
features_tested.submit_button_hover: PASS - Hover shows gold background with burgundy text (#3C0518)
features_tested.form_submission_success: PASS - Success message 'Thank you. Our team will reach out shortly.' displayed after submission
features_tested.header_not_sticky: PASS - Header has position: relative (not sticky/fixed) on enquiry page
features_tested.no_rounded_corners: PASS - All form elements have border-radius: 0px
features_tested.responsive_mobile: PASS - Form stacks to single column on mobile (390px), background-size: 100% 100%
